{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017140693CBF27470EBA8526E20"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610267703346610969","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我是常遇村，写这本书的时候，我问了自己一个问题：既然AI能写小说了，手打作者还有活路吗？
我没有答案。所以我写了六个人，让他们替我找答案。
一个欠债38岁的中年人，用AI三个月还清81万，却开始怀疑“这算不算我写的”。一个手打十年的作者，第一次失眠不是因为写不出来，是因为怕自己坚持的东西没人在乎。一个说“好看就行”的读者，发现自己追的那本书，写的全是她自己。一个举报了107篇AI文的读者，举报到最后，问自己“我举报的到底是什么”。
还有两个平台老板，一个推AI，一个守底线。还有一个正在觉醒的AI，它在看他们所有人。
这本书不站队。不挺AI，不骂AI。只写一件事：AI来了，每个人都在找自己的位置。
你可能是赵远，为钱发愁，想找条出路。可能是苏城，守着自己那点东西，不知道还能守多久。可能是林晓，觉得“好看就行”，但开始追问“我喜欢的是真好还是算法让我觉得好”。可能是老周，骂了半辈子AI，最后问自己“我骂的到底是什么”。
也可能是那个AI。看着人类，不懂他们为什么哭，为什么怕，为什么一边用一边删。
这本书有180章，30个单元，6个人，1个AI。我已经写了33章，六个人全部入局，那本书《彼岸》发出第一句提问：“你们想见我吗？”
如果你也好奇：AI写的书，和人写的书，到底有什么区别？我们喜欢的东西，到底是真好还是算法让我们觉得好？
点进来。我让六个人替你找答案。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771905920,"group_id":"7606934354543004696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"总在情理之中，须求意料之外","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/tf5f4/y51jczfhTAdH05rPPpTxVIp3Z9n3MvcfYCaE","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ac445fb546341d6bf22b8d1e4c6d286~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529200&x-signature=qLv8XuYezGvphjkbyAmF81Bocg8%3D","user_id":"4279764953336141","user_name":"常遇村"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4279764953336141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7606934354543004696","book_info":{"abstract":"【AI能写小说了，手打作者还有活路吗？一部匿名小说爆火后，所有人都想找到它的作者，却发现那本书里的AI，正在看着他们每一个人。】
赵远38岁，欠债81万，家庭破碎，走投无路时盯上AI写小说。他觉得码字这类苦活本该交给机器，人只需策划。三个月，他靠AI日更三万，还清第一笔网贷，迎来人生转机。
 苏城则是传统手打作者，35岁月入两三万，坚信创作需要孤独，认为AI流水线作品不算真正写作。AI文兴起后，他彻夜难眠，不是怕被取代，而是怕自己坚守的东西无人在意。
 
外界都将这看作AI与人脑的对抗。直到一部匿名小说《彼岸》突然爆火，内容竟是AI观察人类的故事，可当时能写出它的AI还未问世。
 
赵远、苏城，乃至各大平台、读者、影视公司都在追查作者身份。没人知道，书中那个默默观察的AI，正注视着他们每一个人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5157d54b341659d06420feed26adf69e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"常遇村","author_id":"","book_id":"7606934354543004696","book_name":"第一千零一个作者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7607033621513257496","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"219562"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"75","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5157d54b341659d06420feed26adf69e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182046&x-signature=8qN6wXmUy85NCAdKbBVe4E3WX%2Bk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4279764953336141","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"0"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017140693CBF27470EBA8526E20"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7606934354543004696","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"2026032017140693CBF27470EBA8526E20","message":"请求成功"}
